Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY A PERMANENT ORDER ASSUMING JURISDICTION OVER THE LAW PRACTICE OF EDWARD JEW SHOULD NOT BE GRANTED.
Appearances: Manuel Jimenez of the State Bar of California (538.2288) for plaintiff and moving party; Edward Jew (433.3350) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona.
